hero.title: Kuza
hero.description: Urubuga rugezweho rw'amatsinda y'ubwizigame mu Rwanda. Kurikirana imisanzu, gucunga inguzanyo, no kubaka ubutunzi bw'umuryango—byose ahantu hamwe hizewe.
hero.demoDescription: Reba uko byoroshye gucunga itsinda ryawe ry'Ikimina n'urubuga rwacu

features.title: Ibyo
features.description: Ibikoresho bikomeye byateguwe cyane cyane ku matsinda y'ubwizigame y'u Rwanda. Byoroshye gukoresha, byizewe by'agateganyo.

contributionTracking.title: Gukurikirana Imisanzu
contributionTracking.description: Kurikirana imisanzu ya buri kwezi cyangwa buri cyumweru hamwe n'ibirikumbuzo byikora no kwerekana abishyuye batinze.

smartLoans.title: Inguzanyo Zihanga
smartLoans.description: Gucunga inguzanyo hamwe n'ingingo z'inyungu zihinduka, kubara inyungu bikora, n'imishinga yo kwishyura.

memberManagement.title: Gucunga Abanyamuryango
memberManagement.description: Kwinjiza abanyamuryango bashya byoroshye, gutanga inshingano, no gukurikirana amateka y'imisanzu ku muntu ku muntu.

groupIsolation.title: Ubuzima Bwite bw'Itsinda
groupIsolation.description: Amakuru yose aba yibanda ku itsinda ryawe gusa. Buri tsinda ribona amakuru yaryo gusa.

reportsAnalytics.title: Raporo n'Isesengura
reportsAnalytics.description: Imibare y'igihe nyacyo igaragaza ubwizigame bwose, inguzanyo zikora, inyungu zabonetse, n'imikoreshereze y'abanyamuryango.

smartNotifications.title: Ibimenyetso Bihanga
smartNotifications.description: Ibirikumbuzo bikora byikora ku munsi w'imisanzu, kwishyura inguzanyo, n'amakuru y'ingenzi.

exportReports.title: Gukura Raporo
exportReports.description: Kuramo raporo zuzuye mu buryo bwa PDF cyangwa CSV ku kubika inyandiko no kugenzura.

secureAuth.title: Kwemererwa Gutewe
secureAuth.description: Umutekano nk'uw'ibanki hamwe n'uburenganzira bw'abayobozi, abamukarani, n'abanyamuryango.

howItWorks.title: Uko
howItWorks.description: Tangira ikimina cyawe mu ntambwe enye zoroshye

step1.title: Kora Itsinda Ryawe
step1.description: Shiraho Ikimina yawe mu minota mike. Ongeraho abanyamuryango kandi ushyireho amategeko y'imisanzu.

step2.title: Kwakira Imisanzu
step2.description: Abanyamuryango batanga imisanzu buri gihe. Kurikirana kwishyura no kohereza ibirikumbuzo bikora.

step3.title: Gucunga Inguzanyo
step3.description: Gutanga inguzanyo n'inyungu. Kurikirana kwishyura no kubara inyungu bikora.

step4.title: Gukura Hamwe
step4.description: Reba ubutunzi bw'itsinda ryawe bukura. Bona raporo kandi mwishimire intsinzi hamwe.

pricing.title: Ibiciro Byoroheje,
pricing.description: Hitamo gahunda ikwiriye itsinda ryawe. Ibiciro byose mu mafaranga y'u Rwanda (RWF).

paymentInfo.title: Amakuru y'Ubwishyu
paymentInfo.description: Kugira ngo wiyandikishe ku gahunda yishyurwa, ohereza kwishyu kwawe binyuze muri Mobile Money kuri:
paymentInfo.note: Nyuma yo kwishyura, twandikire hamwe na nimero y'ubwishyu kugira ngo dutangire gahunda yawe.

cta.title: Witeguye Guhindura Ikimina Yawe?
cta.description: Ifatanye n'amatsinda y'ubwizigame y'u Rwanda amaze gukoresha eKimina mu kubaka ubutunzi bw'umuryango mu buziranenge no kwizerwa.
cta.note: Nta karita y'amafaranga isabwa • Ubuntu buhoraho ku matsinda mato

footer.description: Urubuga rugezweho rw'amatsinda y'ubwizigame y'u Rwanda. Kubaka ubutunzi bw'umuryango mu cyizere no kumarana neza.

memberLoans.requestNote: Icyifuzo cyawe kizasuzumwa n'umuyobozi w'itsinda. Igipimo cy'inyungu gishyirwaho n'itsinda ryawe.

groupDisabled.description: Itsinda ryawe ry'Ikimina {{groupName}} ryahagaritswe by'agateganyo n'umuyobozi w'urubuga.
groupDisabled.noAccess: Ntushobora kugera ku kibanza cy'itsinda ryawe
groupDisabled.dataSafe: Amakuru yawe ari umutekano kandi abitswe
groupDisabled.contactAdmin: Vugana n'umuyobozi w'itsinda cyangwa ubufasha bw'urubuga kugira ngo ubone amakuru menshi.

unauthorized.title: Kwinjira Byanzwe
unauthorized.description: Ntufite uburenganzira bwo kugera kuri uru rupapuro. Nyamuneka vugana n'umuyobozi w'itsinda ryawe niba utekereza ko ari ikosa.

systemNotices.title: Amatangazo y'Urubuga
systemNotices.description: Amatangazo y'ingenzi aturuka ku rubuga rwa eKimina
systemNotices.checkBack: Garuka nyuma ku makuru y'ingenzi y'urubuga.

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.description: Ufite ibibazo cyangwa ukeneye ubufasha? Turi hano ku bwawe. Twandikire kandi tuzagusubiza vuba.
contact.formDescription: Uzuza ifishi ikurikira kandi tuzagusubiza mu masaha 24
contact.name: Izina Ryawe
contact.subject: Insanganyamatsiko

about.title: Ibyerekeye eKimina
about.description: eKimina ni urubuga rugezweho rw'amatsinda y'ubwizigame mu Rwanda (Ikimina). Dufasha umuryango kubaka ubutunzi hamwe mu cyizere, ubumwe, n'ikoranabuhanga.
about.missionDesc: Guhindura amatsinda y'ubwizigame y'u Rwanda mu buryo bwa none, gutuma gukorera hamwe ku bijyanye n'amafaranga bikorwa neza, bisobanutse, kandi byizewe ku muryango wose.
about.valuesDesc: Icyizere, ubumwe, n'umuryango ni ibintu by'ingenzi mu byo dukora byose. Twizera ko abantu bashobora gukura hamwe mu by'amafaranga.
about.serveDesc: Kuva ku matsinda mato y'umudugudu kugera ku mashyirahamwe manini, eKimina ikorera itsinda iryo ari ryo ryose ry'Ikimina rishaka uburyo bwiza bwo gucunga ubwizigame n'inguzanyo.
about.securityDesc: Amakuru yawe y'amafaranga arindwa n'uburyo bw'umutekano bukurikije amahame mpuzamahanga. Dufata umutekano w'amakuru yawe nk'iby'agaciro.

careers.title: Injira mu Ikipe Yacu
careers.description: Dufashe guhindura uko umuryango w'u Rwanda wizigamira kandi ukura hamwe. Dushaka abantu bashishikajwe buri gihe.
careers.noPositionsDesc: Nta mwanya uboneka ubu, ariko dushishikajwe buri gihe no kumva abantu b'impano bashishikajwe na fintech no guteza imbere umuryango.
careers.sendCV: Ohereza CV yawe n'amagambo make akwishimira kuri

privacy.title: Politiki y'Ubuzima Bwite
privacy.s1Desc: Dukusanya amakuru utanga wenyine, harimo amazina yawe, aderesi ya imeli, nimero ya telefoni, n'amakuru y'amafaranga ajyanye n'ibikorwa by'itsinda ry'ubwizigame (imisanzu, inguzanyo, no kwishyura).
privacy.s2Desc: Amakuru yawe akoreshwa mu gutanga no kunoza serivisi zacu, gucunga itsinda ry'ubwizigame, gukora imisanzu n'inguzanyo, kohereza ibimenyetso, no kwemeza umutekano wa konti yawe.
privacy.s3Desc: Dushyira mu bikorwa uburyo bw'umutekano bukurikije amahame mpuzamahanga harimo ibanga, kubika amakuru mu mutekano, no kugenzura ubugenzuzi kugira ngo turinde amakuru yawe bwite n'ay'amafaranga.
privacy.s4Desc: Ntigucuruza amakuru yawe bwite. Amakuru yawe y'amafaranga asangirwa gusa n'abanyamuryango b'itsinda ryawe uko bisabwa n'ibikorwa by'itsinda. Dushobora gusangira amakuru atarangwa ku bijyanye n'isesengura.
privacy.s5Desc: Ufite uburenganzira bwo kubona, guhindura, cyangwa gusiba amakuru yawe bwite. Ushobora gucunga amakuru yawe binyuze mu igenamiterere rya konti yawe cyangwa ukatwandikira.
privacy.s6Desc: Ku kibazo icyo ari cyo cyose kijyanye n'ubuzima bwite, twandikira kuri

termsPage.title: Amabwiriza y'Ikoreshwa
termsPage.s1Desc: Ukoresheje eKimina, wemera aya Mabwiriza y'Ikoreshwa. Niba udahuje, nyamuneka ntukoreshe urubuga rwacu.
termsPage.s2Desc: eKimina itanga urubuga rwa digitale rwo gucunga Ikimina (amatsinda y'ubwizigame), harimo gukurikirana imisanzu, gucunga inguzanyo, gushyira mu bikorwa ibihano, no gusangira inyungu.
termsPage.s3Desc: Ufite inshingano yo kubungabunga ibanga rya konti yawe, gutanga amakuru y'ukuri, no gukurikiza amategeko n'amabwiriza y'itsinda ry'ubwizigame ryawe.
termsPage.s4Desc: eKimina ni igikoresho cyo gucunga ntabwo itanga inama z'amafaranga. Ibyemezo byose by'amafaranga mu itsinda ry'ubwizigame ni inshingano y'itsinda n'abanyamuryango baryo.
termsPage.s5Desc: eKimina itangwa "uko iri" nta garanti. Ntiduhemba igihombo icyo ari cyo cyose cy'amafaranga, amakimbirane y'abanyamuryango, cyangwa ihagarara ry'ikoreshwa.
termsPage.s6Desc: Dufite uburenganzira bwo guhagarika konti zirwanya aya mabwiriza. Ushobora gusiba konti yawe igihe icyo ari cyo cyose binyuze mu igenamiterere rya konti yawe.
termsPage.s7Desc: Ku bibazo bijyanye n'aya mabwiriza, twandikira kuri
